raw_title: Populist Hustlers Versus Establishment Dynasties: The Contentious Visual Framing Dual of the 2022 Kenyan Election
title_en: Populist Hustlers Versus Establishment Dynasties: The Contentious Visual Framing Dual of the 2022 Kenyan Election
title_zh: 民粹主义草根与建制派王朝的对决：2022年肯尼亚大选中的争议性视觉框架双重叙事
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究分析了2022年肯尼亚大选中，媒体如何通过视觉图像来呈现两种对立的政治叙事：一边是自称'草根'的民粹主义候选人，另一边是代表传统权力的'王朝'家族。研究探讨了这些视觉框架如何影响公众对选举的理解和态度。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how media used visual images to present two competing political narratives during Kenya's 2022 election: populist 'hustlers' versus establishment 'dynasties.' It explores how these visual frames shaped public understanding and attitudes toward the election.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于政治传播与视觉媒体分析领域，关注数字时代选举报道中的视觉叙事策略及其社会影响。
research_direction_en: This research falls within political communication and visual media analysis, focusing on visual narrative strategies in election coverage and their societal impacts in the digital age.
